overall.description: Game engine footage (GTA V) showing a first-person walk along a mountain highway shoulder, transitioning onto a dirt trail leading to a coastal overlook. The scene features passing vehicles, power lines, and reveals ocean views with wildlife.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway roadside with passing traffic

events.description: blue SUV and red truck pass by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: blue SUV driving past on the highway

entered.detail: paved two-lane highway with white lane markings
rocky mountain summit visible in the distance
cluster of pine trees on the hillside
steep dirt slope with sparse grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny mountain highway with vehicles passing by. The camera walks along the roadside with a dirt embankment and evergreen trees on the right, while cars and trucks drive past on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with power line corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to a dirt embankment

entered.detail: overhead electrical wires stretching along the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along the highway shoulder with power lines running parallel on the left. The dirt embankment is now on the left side while the highway continues on the right with occasional vehicles passing.

events.description: steps off the asphalt shoulder onto a dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking onto a dirt trail while maintaining parallel to the highway

entered.detail: unpaved sandy path running alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the paved shoulder onto a dirt trail running parallel to the highway. Power poles continue to line the left side while the mountain slope rises on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook trail with ocean views

events.description: ocean becomes visible as the trail curves toward the coast
deer spotted standing on the hillside to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal trail enjoying the ocean view

notable_agents.action: deer standing on the hillside near the trail

entered.detail: blue ocean visible beyond the coastal hills
low shrubs and desert plants on the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up to reveal panoramic ocean views as the highway fades into the distance. Coastal vegetation lines the path, and a deer stands on the hillside to the left. The power lines are now behind as the camera explores the coastal overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain highway that gradually transitions into a scenic coastal overlook. It begins by walking along a sunny roadside where vehicles pass on the asphalt and evergreen trees line a dirt embankment. As the camera progresses, the perspective shifts to follow power lines running parallel to the road before the paved shoulder gives way to a narrow dirt trail. The scene then opens up as the highway fades into the distance, revealing panoramic ocean views and coastal vegetation. Finally, the camera moves past a deer standing on the hillside to explore the wide expanse of the overlook.
